recommendations.title: Fort Apache Napoli
recommendations.overview: The story of Giancarlo Siani, a journalist killed by the Neapolitan Mafia in 1985.

recommendations.title: Mary Forever
recommendations.overview: A teacher discovers his calling. Marco relocates to Palermo from Milan and takes a job teaching in a reform school while he waits for a high school position. He tries to understand and motivate his handful of students, reading them colloquial poetry,

recommendations.title: 5 Star Christmas
recommendations.overview: When the Italian Premier and his companion find a dead body in his hotel suite, while on a trip to Hungary, they find themselves embroiled in a series of comedic situations as they try to avoid a scandal.

recommendations.title: Two Men in Town
recommendations.overview: A former bank robber is released after 10 years in prison. He gets help from a social-worker, but gets harassed by an old cop from his past.

recommendations.title: The Macaluso Sisters
recommendations.overview: Maria, Pinuccia, Lia, Katia and Antonella are five sisters who live in an apartment in Palermo. They make a living by renting doves for ceremonies. On a normal day at the beach, tragedy strucks.

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: Made in Britain
recommendations.overview: After being sent to a detention centre, a teenage skinhead clashes with the social workers who want to conform him to the status quo.

recommendations.title: The Woodsman
recommendations.overview: After twelve years in prison, Walter returns home. His family has abandoned him, save for his brother-in-law. Few know he's a sex offender and pedophile. Walter finds an apartment and is regularly visited by his parole officer. He gets a job at a lum

recommendations.title: Pink
recommendations.overview: After being molested, Minal and her friends try to file an FIR against a politician's nephew. When the subsequent case gets rigged, a retired lawyer helps them to fight the case.

recommendations.title: Hurricane Bianca
recommendations.overview: A teacher from New York moves to a small town in Texas, gets fired for being gay, and returns disguised in drag to get revenge on the people who were nasty to him.
